sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Covers le futur simple (rappel, irregular stems) + le futur antérieur (formation, anteriority with dès que/quand/une fois que/d'ici, agreement via auxiliary). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 7 (écologie) (parler de l'avenir; le futur simple et le futur antérieur; thème: solutions durables, ville de demain). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
